# Volunio product brand

## Canonical user-facing identity

```text
TIMEWINDER VOLUNIO
Frivillige, bemanding og planl├”gning
```

- Product name: `Volunio`
- Current organization prefix: `TimeWinder`
- Full current product name: `TimeWinder Volunio`
- Danish subtitle: `Frivillige, bemanding og planl├”gning`

`TimeWinder` is the organization/event prefix. It must be replaceable for a future customer without renaming the Volunio domain, APIs, database identifiers or business contracts.

## Product boundary

Volunio is the standalone master product for volunteer identity, organization, teams, memberships, leadership, events, opportunities, shifts, staffing, qualifications, attendance, communication and reporting.

TimeWinder Operations Hub is an optional operational coordination and planning add-on. Volunio must continue to support its core flows when Operations Hub is unavailable or not licensed.

## Naming rules

Use `Volunio` in new user-facing UI, product copy, help, notifications and product-level documentation.

Use `Volunio domain` or `Frivillig domain` for the technical business domain. Existing stable technical names may remain for compatibility, including:

- the `frivillig` database schema,
- `frivilligUserId`,
- `FrivilligIdentity`, `FrivilligTeam`, `FrivilligRole`,
- existing `frivillig-*` API routes,
- the skill id `frivillig-system-domain`,
- historical task and migration identifiers.

Do not perform a mass rename of stable code, schema or API identifiers solely for branding.

## Prohibited naming

- Do not use `Crew` in the product name.
- Do not describe Volunio as only a shift planner; its scope includes the full volunteer lifecycle and professional administration.
- Do not make Operations Hub part of the Volunio product name; it is an optional add-on.
